subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Muḥammad! Say: My God, my God! I beseech Thee to make me steadfast in Thy Cause and firm in Thy love such that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی محمد قل الهی الهی اسئلک بان تجعلنی ثابتا علی امرک و راسخا فی حبک بحیث
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
